name: Garlic Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mince the garlic cloves, adding salt to prevent sticking and to absorb garlic juices.
2. Toss the minced garlic with shredded cheddar cheese.
3. In a large glass or plastic bowl, make alternating layers of popped corn and the garlic-cheese mixture, coating the popcorn as evenly as possible, especially at the edges of the bowl.
4. Place the bowl in the microwave and cook for 1 minute.
5. Gently shake the bowl, then turn it 180 degrees and cook for an additional 1 minute.
6. Do not overcook. Immediately remove from the microwave and shape into plum-size balls using your hands.
7. Set the popcorn balls on sheets of waxed paper to cool. Makes 4 dozen popcorn balls.
